step_name: search for the latest research on transformers architecture, choose a promising technique and implement your own variant to see what performance you can get out of it

actions.tool: search_tool(query='Transformer architecture improvements site:arxiv.org last 12 months')

Title:PDE-Transformer: Efficient and Versatile Transformers for Physics ...
Snippet:We introduce PDE-Transformer, an improved transformer-based architecture for surrogate modeling of physics simulations on regular grids. We combine recent architectural improvements of diffusion transformers with adjustments specific for large-scale simulations to yield a more scalable and versatile general-purpose transformer architecture, which can be used as the backbone for building large ...
Link:https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.24717

Title:What comes after transformers? – A selective survey connecting ideas in deep learningThis is an extended version of the published paper by Johannes Schneider and Michalis Vlachos titled “A survey of deep learning: From activations to transformers” which appeared at the International Conference on Agents and Artificial Intelligence(ICAART) in 2024. It was selected for post-publication.
Snippet:The original transformer architecture is still the key model for LLMs and a key driver for generative AI – as elaborated in the prior section 3.1. The prior section also highlighted a few trends that emerged in the last few years to improve transformers.
Link:https://arxiv.org/html/2408.00386v1

Title:[2311.12351] Advancing Transformer Architecture in Long-Context Large Language Models: A Comprehensive Survey
Snippet:Transformer-based Large Language Models (LLMs) have been applied in diverse areas such as knowledge bases, human interfaces, and dynamic agents, and marking a stride towards achieving Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). However, current LLMs are predominantly pretrained on short text snippets, which compromises their effectiveness in processing the long-context prompts that are frequently ...
Link:https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.12351

Title:[2502.01612] Self-Improving Transformers Overcome Easy-to-Hard and Length Generalization Challenges
Snippet:Large language models often struggle with length generalization and solving complex problem instances beyond their training distribution. We present a self-improvement approach where models iteratively generate and learn from their own solutions, progressively tackling harder problems while maintaining a standard transformer architecture. Across diverse tasks including arithmetic, string ...
Link:https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.01612

Title:Advancing Transformer Architecture in Long-Context Large Language Models: A Comprehensive Survey
Snippet:There are multiple avenues to explore for advancing the Transformer structure to endow LLMs with long-context capabilities, such as reducing attention complexity during training, designing efficient memory mechanisms, and enhancing the ability for length extrapolation where the model is trained on short sequences but tested on longer ones during inference (Press et al., 2021). In this survey, we provide a comprehensive review of recent advancements in methodologies aimed at improving ...
Link:https://arxiv.org/html/2311.12351v2

answers:
- **Title**: Object Detection with Transformers: A Review
  **Link**: https://arxiv.org/html/2306.04670
  **Summary**: A review of transformer architecture improvements in object detection.
- **Title**: Learning Novel Transformer Architecture for Time-series Forecasting
  **Link**: https://arxiv.org/html/2502.13721v1
  **Summary**: Proposes AutoFormer-TS, a framework for transformer architectures tailored to time-series forecasting.
- **Title**: From Features to Transformers: Redefining Ranking for ...
  **Link**: https://arxiv.org/html/2502.03417v1
  **Summary**: Introduces novel modifications to transformer architectures for effective scaling laws.
- **Title**: What comes after transformers? – A selective survey connecting ideas in deep learning
  **Link**: https://arxiv.org/html/2408.00386v1
  **Summary**: Discusses trends and improvements in transformer architectures for generative AI.
- **Title**: PDE-Transformer: Efficient and Versatile Transformers for Physics ...
  **Link**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.24717
  **Summary**: Introduces PDE-Transformer, an improved transformer-based architecture for physics simulations.
